Dear Mr. Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Software Engineer at Future Horizons Pte. Ltd. Your employment will commence on November 1, 2023. You will be compensated with a monthly salary of SGD 8,500, paid in accordance with our standard payroll practices.

Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing and returning a copy of this letter by October 20, 2023. You may contact us at +65 6123 4567 or hr@futurehorizons.sg should you have any questions.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Emily Wong  
Director of Human Resources  
Future Horizons Pte. Ltd.  

[Signature Block]
